title: Parasite
description: A poor Korean family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household, with increasingly sinister consequences. A razor-sharp satire of class inequality.

title: Mulholland Drive
description: An aspiring actress and an amnesiac woman explore a mysterious identity in Los Angeles. Lynch's surrealist masterpiece blurs dream and reality.

title: There Will Be Blood
description: A ruthless oil prospector clashes with a charismatic preacher in early 20th-century California. A sprawling portrait of American greed and madness.

title: In the Mood for Love
description: Two neighbors in 1960s Hong Kong suspect their spouses are having an affair and develop a deep, restrained connection. A visually lush meditation on longing.

title: Moonlight
description: A young Black man in Miami navigates identity and sexuality across three chapters of his life. An intimate and poetic portrait of self-discovery.

title: No Country for Old Men
description: A hunter stumbles upon a drug deal gone wrong and $2 million in cash, triggering a cat-and-mouse chase with a near-mythic killer. A meditation on fate and violence.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
description: A couple undergoes a procedure to erase each other from their memories after a painful breakup. A heartbreaking and inventive meditation on love and memory.

title: Get Out
description: A Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and uncovers a disturbing secret. A sharp horror film doubling as social commentary on race in America.

title: Spirited Away
description: A young girl becomes trapped in a spirit world and must work in a bathhouse to rescue her parents. Miyazaki's most beloved fantasy epic.

title: The Social Network
description: The founding of Facebook told through multiple legal depositions. A portrait of ambition, betrayal, and what it costs to change the world.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
description: A near-wordless chase through a post-apocalyptic wasteland as a group of enslaved women fight for freedom. An action masterpiece driven by practical effects.

title: The Zone of Interest
description: The commandant of Auschwitz and his family live an idyllic life next to the camp walls. A chilling study of complicity through deliberate absence.

title: Children of Men
description: In a future where humanity has become infertile, a jaded bureaucrat must protect the first pregnant woman in 18 years. Shot with groundbreaking long takes.

title: Inglourious Basterds
description: Two separate plots — one by a Jewish woman, one by Allied soldiers — converge to assassinate Nazi leadership in occupied France.

title: City of God
description: The rise of organized crime in Rio de Janeiro's favelas, spanning two decades, told through the eyes of a boy who wants to become a photographer.

title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon
description: The theft of a legendary sword sets off a chain of events involving warriors, love, and destiny in ancient China. A poetic wuxia masterpiece.

title: 4 Months, 3 Weeks and 2 Days
description: Two women navigate an illegal abortion in communist Romania. Shot in long, unbroken takes, it's one of cinema's most claustrophobic experiences.

title: The Tree of Life
description: A Texas family's 1950s childhood is juxtaposed with the origins of the universe. Malick's most ambitious film — part elegy, part cosmic poem.

title: Her
description: A lonely writer falls in love with his AI operating system. A surprisingly tender and melancholic film about connection in the digital age.

title: Boyhood
description: Filmed over 12 years with the same cast, following a boy from age 6 to 18. An unprecedented cinematic experiment in capturing the passage of time.

title: Pan's Labyrinth
description: A young girl in post-Civil War Spain retreats into a dark fantasy world as the brutal reality around her intensifies. A fairy tale for adults.

title: The White Ribbon
description: Mysterious violent events plague a small German village just before World War I. Shot in black and white, it explores the roots of fascism in repression.

title: Caché
description: A Parisian TV host and his family receive mysterious surveillance tapes of their home. A slow-burn thriller about guilt, memory, and French colonial history.

title: 12 Years a Slave
description: Based on the true story of Solomon Northup, a free Black man kidnapped and sold into slavery. An unflinching portrait of America's original sin.

title: Phantom Thread
description: A renowned London dressmaker in the 1950s meets his match in a young woman who becomes his muse and lover. A strange, darkly funny love story about control.

title: Anatomy of a Fall
description: A woman is accused of murdering her husband after he falls from their chalet. A Palme d'Or-winning courtroom drama where truth remains elusive.

title: Adaptation
description: A screenwriter struggles to adapt a book about orchids while his fictional twin thrives. A brilliantly self-referential film about the agony of creation.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces the Joker, an agent of pure chaos, in Gotham City. Elevated superhero filmmaking with Ledger's legendary performance as the Joker.

title: Arrival
description: A linguist is recruited to communicate with mysterious alien visitors. A thoughtful sci-fi film about language, time, and the cost of knowledge.

title: Lost in Translation
description: Two Americans find unexpected companionship in a Tokyo hotel. A delicate film about loneliness and the connections that sustain us.

title: The Departed
description: An undercover cop and a mole within the police force try to expose each other in Boston's Irish mob. Scorsese's propulsive crime thriller.

title: Bridesmaids
description: A woman's life unravels as she serves as maid of honor for her best friend. A groundbreaking comedy that proved women could anchor R-rated studio hits.

title: A Separation
description: A married Iranian couple's separation leads to an accusation with far-reaching consequences. A masterfully constructed moral drama about truth and responsibility.

title: WALL-E
description: A trash-compacting robot left alone on Earth falls in love with a sleek probe robot. Pixar's most daring film — nearly silent, deeply moving.

title: A Prophet
description: A young Arab man enters prison and emerges transformed, having navigated Corsican gangsters and built his own criminal empire. A crime epic about survival.

title: A Serious Man
description: A mild-mannered physics professor's life falls apart as he questions God and meaning. The Coen Brothers' most personal and philosophically rich film.

title: Call Me By Your Name
description: A 17-year-old falls for his father's graduate student over a summer in northern Italy. A sun-drenched, achingly beautiful story of first love.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
description: A painter falls in love with the woman she is commissioned to paint in 18th-century France. A feminist love story told entirely through the female gaze.

title: Lady Bird
description: A headstrong Sacramento teenager navigates her senior year, her complicated mother, and her desperate desire to leave home. Gerwig's directorial debut.

title: Yi Yi
description: Three generations of a Taiwanese family face their individual crises simultaneously. An almost three-hour epic of everyday life that reveals its full depth slowly.

title: Amélie
description: A shy Parisian waitress decides to secretly improve the lives of those around her while neglecting her own happiness. A delightful, visually inventive fairy tale.

title: The Master
description: A drifting WWII veteran becomes entangled with the charismatic leader of a cult-like movement. A hypnotic study of power and need.

title: Oldboy
description: A man imprisoned for 15 years with no explanation is suddenly released and seeks revenge. A shocking, beautifully crafted revenge thriller.

title: Once Upon a Time in Hollywood
description: A fading TV actor and his stunt double navigate a changing Hollywood in 1969. Tarantino's most relaxed and elegiac film.

title: Moneyball
description: The Oakland A's general manager uses statistical analysis to build a competitive team on a tiny budget. A crowd-pleasing film about challenging the establishment.

title: Roma
description: A year in the life of a middle-class Mexico City family, centered on their live-in housekeeper. Cuarón's deeply personal black-and-white masterpiece.

title: Almost Famous
description: A teenage journalist goes on tour with a rising rock band for Rolling Stone magazine. A love letter to 1970s rock and the magic of music.

title: The Lives of Others
description: A Stasi agent secretly surveilling a playwright in East Germany begins to be moved by the art he monitors. A deeply moving drama about empathy and redemption.

title: Before Sunset
description: Two people who met nine years ago have 80 minutes together in Paris before one must catch a flight. Almost entirely dialogue — one of cinema's most romantic films.

title: Up
description: A 78-year-old man ties thousands of balloons to his house and flies to South America, befriending a young boy scout. Opens with one of cinema's most moving montages.
